title: Temperature-Dependent CSD Flickering: Causal Evidence via Noise Intensity Manipulation
summary: Demo notebook analyzing pre-computed CSD (Critical Slowing Down) flickering experiment results across 4 LLM sampling temperatures (0.4, 0.7, 1.0, 1.3). Loads 32 examples (8 difficulty levels x 4 temperatures) from gemini-2.0-flash-001 experiment output. Reproduces per-temperature analysis (d* determination, Kendall tau trends, bimodality consensus) and cross-temperature dose-response tests (variance/dip/disagreement scaling with temperature). Generates 4-panel visualization of accuracy curves, embedding variance, disagreement rates, and CSD evidence checks. Computes overall CSD evidence score (0.50). No API calls needed - works entirely on pre-computed data.
